programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Everyone desperately scrambles to live out the coming destruction on their own terms.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick searches for his family after emerging from a coma; Morgan and Duane help teach Rick the new rules for survival.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick unknowingly causes a group of survivors to be trapped by walkers; Rick must confront an enemy more dangerous than the undead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick goes back to Atlanta to save a man's life; Lori and Shane deal with the surprise return of someone they thought was dead.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors threatens Rick, Daryl, T-Dog and Glenn, sending Rick's mission to Atlanta awry; Jim becomes unhinged back at camp.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group to the CDC hoping to cure an infected Jim, who must make a terrible life-and-death decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the group are allowed into the CDC by a strange doctor; all is not what it seems in their newfound haven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads the group out of Atlanta; the group is stopped by a threat unlike anything anyone has seen before; the search for someone who has gone missing.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick discovers a possible safe haven; Shane must go on a dangerous mission to get needed medical supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group awaits Shane's return; Shane finds himself trapped in a school; Daryl and Andrea search for someone in the woods.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Shane makes a deadly sacrifice that inspires unusual behavior and self-distancing; the rest of the group struggles to find the balance between living to die and dying to live.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the other survivors continue searching for Sophia; Hershel disagrees with the group's plan and tells them they are only welcome at the farm temporarily.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn knows too much for his comfort level; Daryl finds a sign of life and tries to make it back to the farm alive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Secrets are told and revealed; Hershel refuses to acknowledge the world's new reality; Andrea comes out of her shell; everything is food for something.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others try to restore order after a terrible discovery; Hershel takes up an old habit and disappears.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Pamela hacen un trato de borrón y cuenta nueva en nombre de sus amigos. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se marchan hacia Oceanside para hablarles de un plan. La Commonwealth celebra el Día de los Fundadores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene huye después del incidente del Día de los Fundadores. Pamela le pide a Mercer que investigue dónde está, para disgusto de Max y La Princesa. Por otro lado, Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se topan con un contratiempo peculiar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol investigan el paradero de sus amigos después de que Pamela los hiciera desaparecer de la Commonwealth. Por desgracia, su única pista es Hornsby. Por otro lado, Pamela le pide a Yumiko que procese a Eugene en nombre de la Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de separarse de sus hijos, Maggie, Gabriel y Rosita siguen un convoy militar hasta un destino misterioso. Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan y Annie acaban en una zona de obras. Daryl y Carol siguen a un tren que lleva a Connie a bordo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel y Negan organizan una revuelta clandestina contra los guardianes. Aaron, Jerry, Lydia y Elijah se unen a Luke y a Jules durante su huida a la costa. Además, Eugene es juzgado con el apoyo de Yumiko como abogada defensora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los alejandrinos y los prisioneros vuelven a la Commonwealth para enfrentarse a Pamela Milton. Por otro lado, una horda se acerca a la ciudad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol llevan a Judith al hospital, mientras que Rosita, Eugene y Gabriel buscan a Coco. Por otro lado, Maggie y Negan se enfrentan a Pamela y los héroes se reúnen para una última batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick Grimes, policía de una pequeña localidad de Georgia, despierta de un coma y repentinamente se encuentra en un mundo apocalíptico. Desorientado, en busca de su familia y una explicación a lo acontecido, Rick ha de adaptarse al nuevo orden.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick llega a caballo a Atlanta, donde encuentra una ciudad desolada. Tras escapar de una situación de peligro, Rick se une a un grupo de supervivientes en unos grandes almacenes, donde le espera un enemigo más peligroso que los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick regresa a Atlanta al sentirse culpable de haber dejado a Merle abandonado en un edificio asolado por zombis. En el campamento, la inesperada llegada de Rick causa tensión entre Lori y Shane, quien había asegurado que Rick había muerto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Atlanta, una banda armada sorprende al grupo de Rick mientras están buscando a Merle. Entretanto, en el campamento, Jim empieza a comportarse de forma extraña, tiene premoniciones y asusta a los niños con una tragedia que se aproxima.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras el ataque al campamento, Rick conduce al grupo hacia el CDC, un recinto de la base sanitaria militar, en el que esperan encontrar un refugio seguro. Durante el trayecto, Jim debe tomar una decisión extremadamente difícil.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un científico inquietante deja entrar a Rick y su grupo en el CDC. No obstante, hay algo extraño y los supervivientes del apocalipsis zombi empiezan a sospechar que no todo es lo que parece en el recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo, liderado por Rick, se topa con una horda de zombis en mitad de la autopista. La pequeña Sophia, asustada, huye sola al bosque y todos tratarán de encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick encuentra una granja en la que buscar ayuda para salvar la vida de su hijo, quien recibió el impacto accidental de una bala. Después, Shane entra en una escuela llena de zombis para llevarse material sanitario junto al tipo que disparó a Carl.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Thomas Dulorme
programme.desc: On April 18th, 2015, Terence Crawford fought Thomas Dulorme for the WBO World Super Lightweight Title in Arlington, Texas. Putting on the pressure and showing his aggressive style, Crawford scored three knockdowns in the sixth round to get the TKO.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Viktor Postol
programme.desc: On July 23rd, 2016, Terence Crawford fought Viktor Postol for the WBO and WBC World Super Lightweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Scoring two knockdowns, Crawford dominated the fight, earning a much deserved unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Yuriorkis Gamboa
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2014, Terence Crawford fought Yuriorkis Gamboa for the WBO Lightweight Title at Century Link Center in Omaha. In Top Rank's 2014 Fight of the Year, Terence Crawford shined in front of his hometown, stopping Gamboa in the ninth round.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Roberto Duran
programme.desc: On June 15th, 1984 Thomas Hearns fought Roberto Duran for WBC World Super Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that resulted in a technical knockout victory in the second round by Hearns.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Kendall Holt
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2009, Timothy Bradley Jr fought Kendall Holt for the WBC and WBO Light Welterweight Titles at the Bell Centre in Montreal. Holt scored two knockdowns to keep the fight close, but Bradley stayed aggressive enough to earn the decision.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Ruslan Provodnikov
programme.desc: On March 16th, 2013, Timothy Bradley fought Ruslan Provodnikov for the WBO Welterweight Title in Carson, California. Provodnikov put up a very strong challenge in an incredible fight, but Bradley prevailed, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley vs Manny Pacquiao I
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Manny Pacquiao and Timothy Bradley started their trilogy at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a battle for the WBO World Welterweight title that ended in a split decision win for Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie shoots her 1st commercial and is overwhelmed by the chaos of directing. Mehgan and new friend Patrice support Jackie's endeavor, but later Mehgan starts calling Patrice "evil". Besties Draya & Malaysia fight for the 1st time. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: It's time for a weekend away in Santa Barbara and at a pre-party lunch, Jackie lets loose with every drink she can get her hands on. Draya gets the side eye when she introduces her "real" friend, Angel, to the group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Santa Barbara comes to a dramatic end when Draya prompts Mehgan to question Jackie's loyalty. Jackie's actions towards Mehgan may prove unforgivable but, back in LA, Jackie puts the blame for all the group drama on Draya. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi and Mehgan bond over their hatred of crazy Jackie, and Mehgan plots her revenge for getting spit on. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Draya says some unforgivable things that leave her fledgling friendships on the line. Brandi and husband Jason try to reconcile their differences in couples therapy, but have Jason's actions caused too much damage to Brandi's heart? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi wins the group's support when the truth about Draya is revealed. Angel styles Malaysia at her luxury bedding photo shoot, but tensions arise when Malaysia disses Angel's risqué lingerie line. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia refuses to stand for Jackie's underhanded comments and kicks her out of her party. Shaunie invites the girls to her son's clothing line launch and hopes to bring some resolve to the group now that Draya is gone. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Angel attempts to defend her character but is quickly put in the hot seat when Malaysia and Mehgan come for her. Jackie and Malaysia grow sick of their differences and try to use this vacation to finally mend fences. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Mehgan finally pushes Angel to her breaking point and a second beach brawl ignites when Brandi and Malaysia confront the Miami ladies, Tami and Shaunie, because of some assumed giggling. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi questions whether to return to LA. Jackie's husband Doug Christie is being offered a new job. Angel Brinks and Malaysia have drama over their dress-related beef. Tami Roman is in town with the hopes of having a baby. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi throws a Welcome to L.A. party for her "sister" Duffey but Malaysia's attitude is anything but welcoming. Brandi's ex Jason returns hoping to rekindle their relationship. Jackie surprises Doug with a downtown condo. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brandi must defend Malaysia's behavior to "sister" Duffey. Malaysia and Angel Brinks attempt to put their feud to rest. Angel Brinks holds a launch party for her clothing line, but drama threatens to derail the event. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin takes a $500 stagecoach ride with an embezzler, a convicted cutthroat, and a murderer to collect the other half of that bill.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin trails a killer and bank robber to a saloon but while trying to capture him, the saloon's owner, Big Red, is shot.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin urges a momma's boy farmer to win back his wayward mail-order bride, by besting party-animal neighbor Rud Saxon in a dance contest.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Bugbear wants to change its image. When Paladin is hired, his idea of disarmament is working fine. Until a missionary rides to town with her own methods for doing the same thing.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is offered $1000 to win a horse race called a mule kalanta. When he arrives he finds out what the bet is, and he decides to make a change.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin crosses paths with Sarah Gibbs on her way to see her husband's hanging for a crime he did commit. A proper burial is all she is seeking but she has a paper that says she can't even visit him.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: European pianist Franz Lister comes to the United States to give a concert for Mona Lansing. When Lister's piano is stolen, Mona hires Paladin to get it back.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Escaped killer, Ben Jalisco, is a ruthless hunter who has murdered more than 30 men. Now he is after his wife, Lucy, who informed on him and Paladin, who brought him in.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Against a background of sudden death and romance, Hollister comes to grips with beautiful young widow Sarah Curtice and her band of gunmen. Clay's efforts to combat their expanding crime wave provoke a dramatic showdown with Sarah's hired guns.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When Chris Anderson confesses to Sheriff Hollister that Brewster Flat's Sheriff Binns and his deputy were in on a robbery, Sheriff Hollister 'cuts himself in' to the deal to force a showdown among the thieves and expose a double cross.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Sam Carver (Lee Van Cleef) escapes the custody of Deputy Marshal Bledsoe thanks to some rowdy conventioneers aboard the train. Jumping off, he heads to Tombstone Territory where he takes refuge at Hendrick's ranch.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister rides the stage to Laramie with a court order concerning a murder indictment against a man named Rowan. Clay finds that his fellow passengers include Rowan himself (under an alias) and a hired gun paid to kill the Sheriff.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Harvey Logan and his gunfighters take over the town of Sunglow and have themselves on a spree. Notified that the telegraph line to Sunglow is dead, Sheriff Hollister and editor Claibourne ride over to investigate and are trapped and thrown into jail.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister hears a distant shot but finds nothing to explain it. When Nancy Cooley arrives in Tombstone looking for her uncle who cannot be found, the sheriff solves the riddle of his disappearance and saves Nancy from becoming a gunman's victim.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: When a British writer arrives in Tombstone to gather material for a series about the American West, he tags along with Sheriff Hollister and a prisoner as they travel to Yuma prison. But the journalist is devising a dangerous plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The great fire of 1881 nearly wiped out the town. As a result, Tombstone is in danger of losing its status as County Seat to nearby Benson, leading to a feud over the matter. Hollister's guns must right a wrong when fire mysteriously strikes again.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gallant Bat Masterson ransoms a Medal of Honor, in an adventure with heartless men. Thieves steal the most priceless possession of Mrs. Dalbot, the widow of a National hero, and Bat sets out to get it back.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The town of Las Tables is about to hang three men - Bat Masterson finds Marshal MacWilliams' son hiding in the Las Tables graveyard - It's a much less macabre place than the town, itself, where three men are about to be hanged.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The town of Meeker, Colorado is made frightful by the invasion of three men set upon killing one of its women. Bat Masterson interferes.

programme.title: Bat Masterson

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Army Civilian Scout Bat Masterson (Gene Barry) nearly gets his neck stretched in an affair involving Colorado politics when he finds he needs to extricate himself from a capitol charge arising from a Major's ravenous political ambitions.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Bat arrives in Lordsbury to meet a friend, he changes his mind, making a 'different appointment,' instead. Three power-hungry ranchers and Lordsbury's top lawman have ganged up on Bat's friend and killed him.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: The cry of 'Silver!' is heard again in Monument City, a ghost mining camp once the scene of a historic silver strike. Prospector Bat Masterson, who has an old claim, returns to Monument City to find he's road-blocked by Clay Adams and Harvey Mason.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson becomes a 'Pinkerton.' The famous detective agency baffled in their attempts to expose crime chieftain John Kelso enlists Bat to find evidence that will put Kelso behind bars permanently.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Reunited at last, Yugi and his friends rejoice. But their celebration is soon interrupted by a pack of man-eating wolves, a giant turtle, and an angry Genie!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa translates an ancient stone tablet which directs the gang to locate the "Fortress of Fear." Now they have until sunset to find this mysterious structure or they'll be trapped in the world of Capsule Monsters forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends discover that in order to return home to the real world they must pass a series of tests: the Five Sacred Trials. The first of which pits them against enormous sand worms and a mysterious voice that travels with the desert wind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping their battle in the desert, the gang finds themselves stranded on a mysterious floating island, where they face a monster that derives its strength from the sun.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's on to level three as Yugi and his friends are transported to a lava-covered wasteland. To make matters worse, Joey is possessed by an evil force, and destroying it may mean destroying Joey as well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends are faced with an impossible task: locating a magical apple in a forest full of apple trees.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang stumbles upon a small kingdom dominated by a clan of fierce dragons known as The Fiendish Five. If they fail to slay these beasts, one of Yugi's friends must give up his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends defeat the Fiendish Five…or so they think. These ferocious dragons have merged together and are now more powerful than ever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Although the gang has passed the five sacred trials, the most dangerous test is yet to come. Now Yugi must face the spirit of Alexander the Great in an all-out Capsule Monsters war with the ultimate stakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!
